## Type of Change

<!-- Mark all that apply with an `x`. -->
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)

- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor (no functional changes)
- [ ] ✅ Tests only
- [ ] 🔧 Chore / maintenance

## Checklist

<!-- Confirm the following before requesting review. -->
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] I have added or updated tests where appropriate.
- [ ] I have updated documentation/comments where needed.
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors.
- [ ] I have considered accessibility, security, and performance impacts.
- [ ] I have verified there are no breaking changes, or documented them clearly.
